text: 38. Subcontractor shall manufacture all countertops accurately to shape and dimensions shown on final shop drawings. Unit  slabs,  excluding  kitchen  island  slabs,  shall  be  shipped  2'  to  3'  longer  than  dimensions  shown  on  the Subcontract Documents and field cut to ensure proper installation.  Subcontractor shall submit shop drawings for approval reflecting which unit slabs will be ordered long. The countertops for all units will be prefabricated, cut, and finished  per  the  approved  shop  drawings.  When  installing,  Subcontractor  shall  field  verify  and  check  actual openings, and all dimensions indicated on the approved shop drawings shall be maintained. Subcontractor shall perform minimal countertop cutting, buffing, and finishing in the field.
